notes: 2026-05-04: Task 10: Added index_for_point(x,y) + line_top_for_offset to TextLayout in text.rs; 10 TDD tests; implements p3 spool task 'Implement vertical cursor movement (up/down)' foundation (mmbvrptz-3zej). Uses Line::text_range() (verified in parley 0.7 run.rs:82 and line.rs:33). Cluster::from_point already supported y. PR #70. Task 7: All 35 open PRs and 5 open issues verified — labels correct (all have enhancement/automation/repo-assist or appropriate labels). Next priorities: task_5_maintain_prs (2026-04-29), task_8_release (2026-04-29), task_6_stale_nudges (2026-04-27), task_9_welcome (2026-04-27). Remaining genuinely unimplemented spool tasks: move_up/move_down in TextEditState (needs PRs #66+#68+#69 merged; foundation in PR #70), vertical scrolling multiline (p3 complex), line layout system multiline (p3 complex), view memoization (p3 deferred).

dep_audit_2026_04_26.notes: Verified 2026-04-30: still same versions as 2026-04-26 audit. No urgent updates needed.

text_layout_index_for_point_pr_2026_05_0.approach: index_for_point: trivial extension of index_for_x — passes real y to Cluster::from_point (which already supported y). line_top_for_offset: iterates layout.lines(), uses Line::text_range() to find containing line, accumulates y via line.metrics().line_height. Clean O(n-lines) traversal.
text_layout_index_for_point_pr_2026_05_0.notes: Foundation for p3 spool task 'Implement vertical cursor movement (up/down)' (mmbvrptz-3zej). Wiring move_up/move_down into TextEditState is the next step after PRs #66+#68+#69 merge.

files_changed: crates/motif_core/src/input/text_state.rs (InputStateEvent enum + pending_events field + take_events() + 11 tests)
input_state_events_pr_2026_05_03.approach: Drain-based event queue (std::mem::take) — idiomatic Rust, avoids FnMut closure borrow issues. TextChanged emitted from insert_text + set_content; Undo/Redo emitted only when stacks are non-empty.
input_state_events_pr_2026_05_03.notes: Implements p2 spool task 'Implement event emission' (mmbvrl76-pqfm) from text-input-rewrite stream.
